28	// QuotaStateFromUsedPercent maps a usage percentage to a quota state string.
29	func QuotaStateFromUsedPercent(usedPercent int) string {
30		if usedPercent >= 95 {
31			return "blocked"
32		}
33		if usedPercent >= 0 {
34			return "ok"
35		}
36		return "unknown"
37	}

input.old_string:
func buildUsage(entries []agent.SessionIndexEntry, name string, kind agent.UsageMatchKind, now time.Time) *ProviderUsage {
	counts := agent.AggregateUsageCounts(entries, name, kind, now)
	u := &ProviderUsage{}
	v := counts.TokensLastHour
	u.TokensUsedLastHour = &v
	v2 := counts.TokensLast24h
	u.TokensUsedLast24h = &v2
	v3 := counts.RequestsLastHour
	u.RequestsLastHour = &v3
	v4 := counts.RequestsLast24h
	u.RequestsLast24h = &v4
	return u
}

const PROVIDER_STATUSES_QUERY = gql`
		query ProviderStatuses {
			providerStatuses {
				name
				kind
				providerType

				model

input.new_string:
const PROVIDER_STATUSES_QUERY = gql`
		query ProviderStatuses {
			providerStatuses {
				name
				kind
				providerType
				baseURL
				model
				status
				reachable
				detail
				modelCount
				isDefault
				cooldownUntil
				lastCheckedAt
				defaultForProfile
				usage {
					tokensUsedLastHour
					tokensUsedLast24h
					requestsLastHour
					requestsLast24h
				}
				quota {
					ceilingTokens
					ceilingWindowSeconds
					remaining
					resetAt
				}
			}
			harnessStatuses {
				name
				kind
				providerType
				baseURL
				model
				status
				reachable
				detail
				modelCount
				isDefault
				cooldownUntil
				lastCheckedAt
				defaultForProfile
				usage {
					tokensUsedLastHour
					tokensUsedLast24h
					requestsLastHour
					requestsLast24h
				}
				quota {
					ceilingTokens
					ceilingWindowSeconds
					remaining
					resetAt
				}
			}
		}
	`;

	const DEFAULT_ROUTE_QUERY = gql`
		query DefaultRouteStatus {
			defaultRouteStatus {
				modelRef
				resolvedProvider
				resolvedModel
				strategy
			}
		}
	`;

input.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat(providers): address unified-view review findings [ddx-23978824]

Close the blocking gaps surfaced by the reviewer on the agent-endpoints
unified view:

- buildUsage now returns nil when the session index has no matching rows,
  so the UI renders "not reported" instead of fabricated 0 / 0 counts.
- Wire QuotaFromRateLimitSignal into the harness status path via a new
  RecordHarnessRateLimit/LookupHarnessRateLimit cache. Harness dispatch
  paths (and tests) can publish parsed Anthropic/OpenAI rate-limit
  headers; quotaFromHarnessInfo prefers that signal over the
  percent-only upstream QuotaState so Claude/Codex rows get real token
  ceilings.
- Frontend /providers: split defaultRouteStatus into its own query that
  fires asynchronously so a slow route resolve cannot block table
  first-paint, and add 2.5s polling so probe-driven row updates surface
  within the 5s AC budget.
- Frontend /providers/[name]: render the quota ceiling as an overlaid
  dashed line on the 7d and 30d charts (previously only a text
  annotation below the 7d chart).

Tests: TestBuildUsageReturnsNilWhenNoEntries,
TestHarnessQuotaFromCapturedRateLimitSignal,
TestProviderTrendProjectionFromSeededUsageAndCeiling,
TestProviderStatusesPerfFixture (≥1.2k rows, 5 endpoints + 2 harnesses,
p95 ≤150ms), TestProviderTrendPerfFixture (1.2k rows, 30d window,
p95 ≤300ms).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)" 2>&1 | tail -20
